% Fig 3B high-resolution CRRA contours.
% Generated from a 200x200 evaluation grid + matplotlib marching-squares,
% then thinned to ~45 points per contour by arc-length resampling.
%
% gamma = 0.5, tau = 2.0, u_1 = 1.0, K = 3, W = 1.
% Grid: (u_2, u_3) in [-3.5, 3.5]^2, 200x200 = 40000 cells.
% Levels: [0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8].
%
% PRICES: NO-LEARNING market clearing (sum_k x_crra(Lambda(tau u_k), p) = 0).
% The converged REE mu* at G=15 was not committed as raw data when this
% file was generated; only rendered figure outputs are in the repo.
% At gamma=0.5, tau=2 the no-learning vs REE prices differ by ~5% in
% logit p, so contour SHAPES match REE qualitatively but absolute
% level positions are shifted slightly. Replace nl_price with
% REE_price (using interpolated mu*) and re-run when mu_star.npz
% is available.

% p = 0.5
\addplot coordinates {(-3.5000,0.0180)(-3.3500,0.0180)(-3.1999,0.0180)(-3.0499,0.0180)(-2.8998,0.0180)(-2.7498,0.0180)(-2.5997,0.0180)(-2.4497,0.0179)(-2.2996,0.0179)(-2.1496,0.0178)(-1.9995,0.0177)(-1.8495,0.0174)(-1.6994,0.0169)(-1.5494,0.0160)(-1.3993,0.0143)(-1.2493,0.0113)(-1.0994,0.0058)(-0.9496,-0.0040)(-0.8006,-0.0212)(-0.6535,-0.0505)(-0.5113,-0.0979)(-0.3791,-0.1684)(-0.2628,-0.2628)(-0.1684,-0.3791)(-0.0979,-0.5113)(-0.0505,-0.6535)(-0.0212,-0.8006)(-0.0040,-0.9496)(0.0058,-1.0994)(0.0113,-1.2493)(0.0143,-1.3993)(0.0160,-1.5494)(0.0169,-1.6994)(0.0174,-1.8495)(0.0177,-1.9995)(0.0178,-2.1496)(0.0179,-2.2996)(0.0179,-2.4497)(0.0180,-2.5997)(0.0180,-2.7498)(0.0180,-2.8998)(0.0180,-3.0499)(0.0180,-3.1999)(0.0180,-3.3500)(0.0180,-3.5000)};
% p = 0.7
\addplot coordinates {(-0.2402,3.5000)(-0.2402,3.3472)(-0.2402,3.1945)(-0.2402,3.0417)(-0.2402,2.8890)(-0.2401,2.7362)(-0.2401,2.5835)(-0.2399,2.4307)(-0.2397,2.2780)(-0.2392,2.1252)(-0.2384,1.9725)(-0.2369,1.8197)(-0.2341,1.6670)(-0.2289,1.5143)(-0.2202,1.3618)(-0.2046,1.2099)(-0.1784,1.0595)(-0.1376,0.9123)(-0.0798,0.7711)(-0.0058,0.6375)(0.0812,0.5121)(0.1783,0.3941)(0.2829,0.2829)(0.3941,0.1783)(0.5121,0.0812)(0.6375,-0.0058)(0.7711,-0.0798)(0.9123,-0.1376)(1.0595,-0.1784)(1.2099,-0.2046)(1.3618,-0.2202)(1.5143,-0.2289)(1.6670,-0.2341)(1.8197,-0.2369)(1.9725,-0.2384)(2.1252,-0.2392)(2.2780,-0.2397)(2.4307,-0.2399)(2.5835,-0.2401)(2.7362,-0.2401)(2.8890,-0.2402)(3.0417,-0.2402)(3.1945,-0.2402)(3.3472,-0.2402)(3.5000,-0.2402)};
% p = 0.8
\addplot coordinates {(0.3148,3.5000)(0.3148,3.3652)(0.3148,3.2305)(0.3149,3.0957)(0.3149,2.9609)(0.3149,2.8262)(0.3149,2.6914)(0.3150,2.5567)(0.3151,2.4219)(0.3153,2.2871)(0.3156,2.1524)(0.3161,2.0176)(0.3170,1.8828)(0.3185,1.7481)(0.3211,1.6134)(0.3256,1.4787)(0.3330,1.3441)(0.3456,1.2100)(0.3660,1.0768)(0.3986,0.9461)(0.4470,0.8204)(0.5143,0.7039)(0.6008,0.6008)(0.7039,0.5143)(0.8204,0.4470)(0.9461,0.3986)(1.0768,0.3660)(1.2100,0.3456)(1.3441,0.3330)(1.4787,0.3256)(1.6134,0.3211)(1.7481,0.3185)(1.8828,0.3170)(2.0176,0.3161)(2.1524,0.3156)(2.2871,0.3153)(2.4219,0.3151)(2.5567,0.3150)(2.6914,0.3149)(2.8262,0.3149)(2.9609,0.3149)(3.0957,0.3149)(3.2305,0.3148)(3.3652,0.3148)(3.5000,0.3148)};
